# Handoff Rules

Route to `implementation-handoff-desk` when a review finding requires implementation work.

A handoff must include:

- Review target and source facts.
- Blocking findings only, unless the user asks for all follow-ups.
- Exact files or components implicated.
- Recommended tests.
- Out-of-scope items.
- Halt conditions for the implementation agent.

Do not let review handoff become a broad refactor request. Keep it tied to merge-blocking or explicitly accepted follow-up work.
